title: Parasites+
description:
Can you beat the 12 phases of the Scape and run Parasites mod??
Play through the Parasite mod along with some other mods to help along your journey!
body:
My freinds said that i cant beat the Parasites mod and its 12 phases so i made the mod pack to proove them wrong

Play the Scape and Run Parasites mod along with extra structers, Biomes, Torch's on the celling??!, New weponds/armour and some other mods that'll help and maybye even sometimes make the game harder. 
Play with friends or play alone. 
Are you up for the challenge?? 

If your having trouble using the Craftify Mod you can acsses the settings through Essential settings 
Enjoy!
